title: Practical Quantum Machine Learning
description: Implement practical quantum machine learning workflows including variational classifiers, quantum kernels, data encoding strategies, and best practices for NISQ devices.
learningObjectives: Implement variational quantum classifiers (VQC) from scratch
Design and compute quantum kernel matrices for classical data
Choose appropriate data encoding strategies for different problems
Apply best practices for training QML models on NISQ hardware
Evaluate QML model performance and compare with classical baselines
